auth.generic-login-error-descriptor: something happened and I couldn't log you in.
auth.cant-load-login-details:
I can't seem to load the login settings. Please check your internet connection.
If you continue to get this error, please contact {{admin}}.
auth.generic-signup-error-descriptor: something happened and I couldn't sign you up...

status.403: You don't have permission to access this page.
status.404: This page can't be found on the server. It may have moved or been deleted.
status.418: The server has rather unfortunately decided to become a teapot.
status.500: The server couldn't handle your request. Please try again later.\nIf this issue persists, please contact {{admin}} and provide the steps you followed to cause this error.
status.fallback: Something died in an unexpected way - please report this to {{admin}}.

react.frontend-error-details: there's been a frontend error and unfortunately this page can't be loaded at the minute. please report this issue to the administrator of this instance of People Counter!
